card_eligibility.source_phrase: A physical Billerica Public Library card is available to all Billerica residents.
card_eligibility.source_block: A physical Billerica Public Library card is available to all Billerica residents. Property owners and those employed in town may also obtain a card if they are not already part of the Merrimack Valley Library Consortium (MVLC). The Library will follow MVLC policies and procedures when registering patrons who are residents of MVLC communities.
